meta.title: Shoulder & Elbow — Diagnosis and Treatment | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
meta.description: Shoulder pain, rotator cuff tears, instability and elbow injuries — diagnosis and treatment by Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko, shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience. Maccabi clinics.

injections.metaDescription: Shoulder and elbow injections: which conditions they treat, the available injection types, how the procedure works and aftercare guidance — from a specialist with 37 years of experience.

shoulderSurgery.metaTitle: Shoulder Surgery — Rotator Cuff Repair & Stabilization | Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko
shoulderSurgery.metaDescription: Arthroscopic shoulder surgery: rotator cuff repair and shoulder stabilization after dislocations. How to prepare for surgery and what to expect during recovery.

elbowSurgery.metaDescription: Elbow surgery: tennis elbow and golfer's elbow that resist conservative care, loose bodies in the joint and elbow arthroscopy — when surgery is needed and what to expect.

rehabilitation.metaDescription: Rehabilitation after shoulder surgery: recovery phases, typical timelines, working with a physiotherapist and tips for a safe return to daily life and sport.

physiotherapy.metaDescription: Shoulder physiotherapy as first-line treatment: exercise principles, muscle strengthening and restoring range of motion — and when conservative care is preferable to surgery.
